'''âv-b-m''' ('''kavabam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:precise|precise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:precise|precise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-b-m
|-
! Lemma
| kavabam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivabam|thivabam]] || [[word:jivabam|jivabam]] || [[word:shivabam|shivabam]] || [[word:kivabam|kivabam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvabam|thuthuvabam]] || [[word:jujuvabam|jujuvabam]] || [[word:shushuvabam|shushuvabam]] || [[word:kukuvabam|kukuvabam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvabam|thuvabam]] || [[word:juvabam|juvabam]] || [[word:shuvabam|shuvabam]] || [[word:kuvabam|kuvabam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvabam|thuvabam]] || [[word:juvabam|juvabam]] || [[word:shuvabam|shuvabam]] || [[word:kuvabam|kuvabam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevabam|thevabam]] || [[word:jevabam|jevabam]] || [[word:shevabam|shevabam]] || [[word:kevabam|kevabam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovabam|thothovabam]] || [[word:jojovabam|jojovabam]] || [[word:shoshovabam|shoshovabam]] || [[word:kokovabam|kokovabam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovabam|thovabam]] || [[word:jovabam|jovabam]] || [[word:shovabam|shovabam]] || [[word:kovabam|kovabam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovabam|thovabam]] || [[word:jovabam|jovabam]] || [[word:shovabam|shovabam]] || [[word:kovabam|kovabam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvabam|thĂŠvabam]] || [[word:jĂŠvabam|jĂŠvabam]] || [[word:shĂŠvabam|shĂŠvabam]] || [[word:kĂŠvabam|kĂŠvabam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavabam|thathavabam]] || [[word:jajavabam|jajavabam]] || [[word:shashavabam|shashavabam]] || [[word:kakavabam|kakavabam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavabam|thavabam]] || [[word:javabam|javabam]] || [[word:shavabam|shavabam]] || [[word:kavabam|kavabam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavabam|thavabam]] || [[word:javabam|javabam]] || [[word:shavabam|shavabam]] || [[word:kavabam|kavabam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavabam|shavabam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavabam|goshavabam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavabam|gokishavabam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavabamnĂŒ|shavabamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavabamnknĂŒ|goshavabamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavabamnĂŒ|gokishavabamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavabamshĂ«|shavabamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavabamnkshĂ«|goshavabamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavabamshĂ«|gokishavabamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavabamro|shavabamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavabamnkro|goshavabamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavabamro|gokishavabamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavabamu|shavabamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavabamnkmu|goshavabamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavabamu|gokishavabamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavabamsher|shavabamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavabamnksher|goshavabamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavabamsher|gokishavabamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavabamng|shavabamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavabamnkng|goshavabamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavabamng|gokishavabamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavabamya|shavabamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavabamnkya|goshavabamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavabamya|gokishavabamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavabamyam|shavabamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavabamnkyam|goshavabamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavabamyam|gokishavabamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavabamnĂŒshĂ«|shavabamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavabamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavabamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavabamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavabamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavabamnĂŒro|shavabamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavabamnknĂŒro|goshavabamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavabamnĂŒro|gokishavabamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavabamnĂŒmu|shavabamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavabamnknĂŒmu|goshavabamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavabamnĂŒmu|gokishavabamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavabamshĂ«nĂŒ|shavabamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavabamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavabamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavabamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavabamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavabamshĂ«ro|shavabamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavabamnkshĂ«ro|goshavabamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavabamshĂ«ro|gokishavabamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavabamshĂ«mu|shavabamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavabamnkshĂ«mu|goshavabamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavabamshĂ«mu|gokishavabamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavabamronĂŒ|shavabamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavabamnkronĂŒ|goshavabamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavabamronĂŒ|gokishavabamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavabamroshĂ«|shavabamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavabamnkroshĂ«|goshavabamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavabamroshĂ«|gokishavabamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavabamromu|shavabamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavabamnkromu|goshavabamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavabamromu|gokishavabamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavabamunĂŒ|shavabamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavabamnkmunĂŒ|goshavabamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavabamunĂŒ|gokishavabamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavabamushĂ«|shavabamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavabamnkmushĂ«|goshavabamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavabamushĂ«|gokishavabamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavabamuro|shavabamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavabamnkmuro|goshavabamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavabamuro|gokishavabamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
